name: ANCBuddy
tagline: Bose QC Ultra control, right from your Mac.
description: ANCBuddy is an independent macOS menu-bar app for Bose QC Ultra headphones and earbuds. It lets Mac users switch Quiet, Aware, and Immersion modes, check battery status, and optionally generate track-aware AI Auto-EQ profiles.
features: Switch Bose QC Ultra Quiet, Aware, and Immersion listening modes from the Mac menu bar
Show battery and connection status for compatible Bose QC Ultra devices
Generate optional AI Auto-EQ profiles for the current track
aiAutoEqPrivacy: AI Auto-EQ is opt-in. When enabled, ANCBuddy sends the current artist, title, and album to ANCBuddy's relay only to generate a 3-band EQ profile for that track. Results are cached by a hashed track key, and raw song names are not stored.
independenceDisclaimer: ANCBuddy is an independent project and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Bose Corporation. Bose, QuietComfort, QC Ultra, and related marks are trademarks of Bose Corporation, used only to describe compatible hardware.

officialSources.title: Apple: Connect a Bluetooth device with your Mac
